mapper.select: select tp.id, tp.title, tp.version_no, tp.scope_desc, tp.owner_id, u.real_name as owner_name, tp.status, tp.created_at, tp.updated_at from test_plan tp left join sys_user u on u.id = tp.owner_id where tp.project_id = #{projectId} and tp.id = #{id} and tp.is_deleted = 0
select id, project_id, title, version_no, scope_desc, owner_id, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from test_plan where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select tc.id, tc.test_plan_id, tp.title as test_plan_title, tc.requirement_id, r.title as requirement_title, tc.task_id, t.name as task_name, tc.case_code, tc.title, tc.precondition, tc.steps, tc.expected_result, tc.actual_result, tc.execution_status, tc.tester_id, u.real_name as tester_name, tc.executed_at, tc.created_at, tc.updated_at from test_case tc left join test_plan tp on tp.id = tc.test_plan_id and tp.is_deleted = 0 left join requirement_info r on r.id = tc.requirement_id and r.is_deleted = 0 left join project_task t on t.id = tc.task_id and t.is_deleted = 0 left join sys_user u on u.id = tc.tester_id where tc.project_id = #{projectId} and tc.id = #{id} and tc.is_deleted = 0

select id, project_id, test_plan_id, requirement_id, task_id, case_code, title, precondition, steps, expected_result, actual_result, execution_status, tester_id, executed_at, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from test_case where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update test_case set test_plan_id = #{testPlanId}, requirement_id = #{requirementId}, task_id = #{taskId}, title = #{title}, precondition = #{precondition}, steps = #{steps}, expected_result = #{expectedResult}, actual_result = #{actualResult}, execution_status = #{executionStatus}, tester_id = #{testerId}, executed_at = #{executedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select d.id, d.test_case_id, tc.title as test_case_title, d.requirement_id, r.title as requirement_title, d.task_id, t.name as task_name, d.defect_code, d.title, d.severity, d.priority, d.status, d.reporter_id, reporter.real_name as reporter_name, d.assignee_id, assignee.real_name as assignee_name, d.description, d.resolution, d.created_at, d.updated_at from defect_record d left join test_case tc on tc.id = d.test_case_id and tc.is_deleted = 0 left join requirement_info r on r.id = d.requirement_id and r.is_deleted = 0 left join project_task t on t.id = d.task_id and t.is_deleted = 0 left join sys_user reporter on reporter.id = d.reporter_id left join sys_user assignee on assignee.id = d.assignee_id where d.project_id = #{projectId} and d.id = #{id} and d.is_deleted = 0

select id, project_id, test_case_id, requirement_id, task_id, defect_code, title, severity, priority, status, reporter_id, assignee_id, description, resolution, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from defect_record where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update defect_record set test_case_id = #{testCaseId}, requirement_id = #{requirementId}, task_id = #{taskId}, title = #{title}, severity = #{severity}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, reporter_id = #{reporterId}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, description = #{description}, resolution = #{resolution}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
